improvements.point: Add measurable results to your work experience
improvements.explanation: Some of your work experiences are still descriptive. Add concrete metrics such as sales growth, process efficiency, or user growth to demonstrate real impact and strengthen your competitiveness.

improvements.point: Clarify your professional summary at the top
improvements.explanation: Your professional summary is still too general. Use 2–3 concise sentences highlighting your core expertise, key experience, and unique value proposition so recruiters immediately understand your positioning.

FAQPage.title: FAQs
FAQPage.description: Everything you need to know about features, services, and how to use the platform.

1.question: How do I use the CV Review feature?
1.answer: Go to the dashboard, select CV Review, then upload your CV in PDF or DOCX format. Once uploaded, the system will process it and show your review results.

2.question: What does CV Review evaluate?
2.answer: The system evaluates CV structure, clarity of work experience, strength of your professional summary, readability, and relevance to recruiter and ATS requirements.

3.question: What do I get after my CV is reviewed?
3.answer: You will receive a CV score, key insights, highlighted strengths, and specific recommendations to improve weaker sections.

4.question: Is my CV stored permanently?
4.answer: Your data is processed securely for analysis purposes. Documents are not used outside the review process and your account management context.

1.question: How do I start using CV Builder?
1.answer: Open CV Builder from the dashboard, fill in core details such as profile, work experience, education, and skills, then review the live preview.

2.question: Can I choose different CV templates?
2.answer: Yes. CV Builder provides multiple template styles you can use based on your professional preference.

3.question: Can I edit my CV content anytime?
3.answer: Yes. You can add, remove, or update CV sections anytime before exporting the final document.

4.question: What format can I download my CV in?
4.answer: After finishing, you can export your CV as a PDF so it is ready to send to recruiters or apply for jobs.

1.question: How do I use Improve LinkedIn?
1.answer: Go to the Improve LinkedIn page, enter your LinkedIn profile URL, and the system will analyze it automatically.

2.question: Which profile parts are analyzed?
2.answer: The feature analyzes your headline, about section, work experience, skills, and overall profile positioning strength.

3.question: What results do I get after LinkedIn analysis?
3.answer: You will get headline suggestions, summary improvements, better experience-writing recommendations, and insights to make your profile more recruiter-friendly.

4.question: Do I need to log in to my LinkedIn account on Cetha?
4.answer: No. You only need to provide the LinkedIn profile URL for analysis, without sharing your LinkedIn password.

1.question: Where can I read articles and watch career tip videos?
1.answer: You can open Career Tips or Articles & Videos to access all educational content available on the platform.

2.question: Can I search specific topics in Career Tips?
2.answer: Yes. The Career Tips page supports category filters and search, so you can quickly find relevant topics.

3.question: What topics are covered in Career Tips?
3.answer: Topics include CV review, CV building, LinkedIn optimization, interview strategies, and general career development.

4.question: Is Career Tips content only in article format?
4.answer: No. In addition to articles, video content is also available so you can choose the learning format you prefer.

TermsPage.title: Terms & Conditions
TermsPage.description: By browsing or using our services, you acknowledge and agree to the following document.

01.title: Service definition
01.content: Cetha is an AI-based platform that provides CV feasibility insights, LinkedIn profile guidance, and career preparation modules. The service is licensed through a web platform for limited public use.

02.title: Account & access
02.content: This service requires account registration. Users agree to provide valid credentials and maintain password security. We are not responsible for account misuse caused by user negligence.

03.title: Prohibited use
03.content: Hacking, illegal scraping, commercial content duplication without partnership, AI prompt injection attempts, and excessive spam toward our system are strictly prohibited.

04.title: User content
04.content: Users retain intellectual property rights over their own CVs. Cetha AI outputs may be used for personal reference, but mass publishing compiled outputs to build similar services is prohibited.

05.title: AI output disclaimer
05.content: AI analysis results are consultative and not final HR decisions. We do not guarantee that following AI recommendations will result in interview success. Final decisions remain in the hands of recruiters.

06.title: Limitation of liability
06.content: We are not liable for financial, moral, or social losses resulting from missed job opportunities. All decisions and actions in the job application process are the user's sole responsibility.

07.title: Service changes
07.content: We may modify feature specifications, disable old features, or apply usage limitations at any time without extensive prior notice, especially for free-tier users.

08.title: Governing law
08.content: The relationship between the platform and users is governed by the civil jurisdiction of the Republic of Indonesia, according to the region where the server operates.

support.title: Questions about these terms?
support.suffix: page and we will help clarify everything.

descriptions.howWorks: See how Cetha works and the technology behind it.

home.description: Thanks for using Cetha platform. Is there anything we can help you with to improve your CV?

onlineCard.title: Our bot is online!
onlineCard.description: Want to ask about CV and career?

whatIs.botAnswer: Cetha is an AI-powered digital career assistant that helps users develop their professional potential. Through features like AI CV Review, job recommendations, and a career chatbot, Cetha supports your digital career growth.

howWorks.botAnswer: Cetha works by using artificial intelligence (AI) to analyze users' career data. From CV information or user input, Cetha provides professional improvement suggestions, recommends relevant jobs, and answers career questions interactively through the chatbot.

howUse.intro: Here are simple steps to use Cetha effectively:
howUse.step1: 1️⃣ Log in to your account, then upload your CV or complete your profile data first.
howUse.step2: 2️⃣ After that, open AI CV Review to get automatic analysis and professional improvement suggestions.
howUse.step3: 3️⃣ Explore Job Recommendations so Cetha can match you with suitable vacancies.
howUse.step4: 4️⃣ If you are still unsure, use the Career Chatbot to ask questions or consult directly about your career.
howUse.closing: That way, you can maximize all of Cetha's potential to build your digital career in a more focused way 🚀
